title: Open Source AI Agents | Github/Repo List | [2025] - Hugging Face
full_text:
Back to Articles Open Source AI Agents | Github/Repo List | [2025] Community Article Published February 21, 2025 Upvote 31 +25 tegridy tegridydev Follow Follow, bookmark, save this tab as I will be updating it regulary (using it as my own notepad & decided i might keep it up to date if i post it here, instead of making the 15th_version of it and not saving it with a name i can remember on my desktop lol) Adala : Autonomous Data Labeling Agent framework. Build your own, multi-agent. Agent4Rec : Recommender system simulator (1,000 agents). Build your own, multi-agent. AgentForge : LLM-agnostic agent building/testing platform. Build your own, multi-agent. AgentGPT : Browser-based, no-code AutoGPT version. General purpose. AgentPilot : Build, manage, chat with agents (desktop app). General purpose. Agents : Library/framework for building language agents. Build your own, multi-agent. AgentVerse : Task-solving & simulation agent platform. Build your own, multi-agent. AI Legion : Multi-agent TS platform (AutoGPT-like). Build your own, multi-agent. Aider : Command-line code editing in local Git repo. Coding, GitHub. AIlice : Agent-calling tree for task execution. General purpose, personal assistant, productivity. AutoGen : Multi-agent framework, diverse agents. Build your own, multi-agent. AutoGPT : Experimental GPT-4 autonomous agent. General purpose. Automata : Code generation with project context. Coding. AutoPR : AI-generated pull requests for issue fixes. Coding, GitHub. Autonomous HR Chatbot : HR query agent with tools. HR, business intelligence, productivity. BabyAGI : Simple AI task management framework. General purpose. BabyBeeAGI : Enhanced BabyAGI (task management). General purpose, productivity. BabyCatAGI : BabyAGI mod, lightweight. General purpose. BabyDeerAGI : BabyAGI mod, parallel tasks, GPT-3.5 only. General purpose. BabyElfAGI : Mod of BabyDeerAGI. General purpose. Peak-AI-agent-stack : RinAI agentic chat stack. Includes graphRAG memory, parallel tool calling, DeepSeek R1 powered web search. CoreAgent : Simple to use LLM Agent framework. AGiXT : Dynamic AI Agent Automation Platform. More from this author 📄 Research Papers Dataset May 23, 2026 WTF is Fine-Tuning? (intro4devs) | [2025] February 16, 2025 Community https://github.com/dleerdefi/peak-ai-agent-stack add this in list

# Open Source AI Agents | Github/Repo List | [2025] - Hugging Face - raw_id: R-037 - original_url: https://huggingface.co/blog/tegridydev/open-source-ai-agents-directory - source_name: keyword search / Anysearch - collected_at: 2026-06-06T05:51:13.100Z ## clean_text Back to Articles Open Source AI Agents | Github/Repo List | [2025] Community Article Published February 21, 2025 Upvote 31 +25 tegridy tegridydev Follow Follow, bookmark, save this tab as I will be updating it regulary (using it as my own notepad & decided i might keep it up to date if i post it here, instead of making the 15th_version of it and not saving it with a name i can remember on my desktop lol) Adala : Autonomous Data Labeling Agent framework. Build your own, multi-agent. Agent4Rec : Recommender system simulator (1,000 agents). Build your own, multi-agent. AgentForge : LLM-agnostic agent building/testing platform. Build your own, multi-agent. AgentGPT : Browser-based, no-code AutoGPT version. General purpose. AgentPilot : Build, manage, chat with agents (desktop app). General purpose. Agents : Library/framework for building language agents. Build your own, multi-agent. AgentVerse : Task-solving & simulation agent platform. Build your own, multi-agent. AI Legion : Multi-agent TS platform (AutoGPT-like). Build your own, multi-agent. Aider : Command-line code editing in local Git repo. Coding, GitHub. AIlice : Agent-calling tree for task execution. General purpose, personal assistant, productivity. AutoGen : Multi-agent framework, diverse agents. Build your own, multi-agent. AutoGPT : Experimental GPT-4 autonomous agent. General purpose. Automata : Code generation with project context. Coding. AutoPR : AI-generated pull requests for issue fixes. Coding, GitHub. Autonomous HR Chatbot : HR query agent with tools. HR, business intelligence, productivity. BabyAGI : Simple AI task management framework. General purpose. BabyBeeAGI : Enhanced BabyAGI (task management). General purpose, productivity. BabyCatAGI : BabyAGI mod, lightweight. General purpose. BabyDeerAGI : BabyAGI mod, parallel tasks, GPT-3.5 only. General purpose. BabyElfAGI : Mod of BabyDeerAGI. General purpose. Peak-AI-agent-stack : RinAI agentic chat stack. Includes graphRAG memory, parallel tool calling, DeepSeek R1 powered web search. CoreAgent : Simple to use LLM Agent framework. AGiXT : Dynamic AI Agent Automation Platform. More from this author 📄 Research Papers Dataset May 23, 2026 WTF is Fine-Tuning?
